purpose: Rules for selecting body-shape/body-proportion LoRA candidates without corrupting the base image.
rules: Prefer mask + denoise + prompt constraints before adding a body-shape LoRA.
Only select LoRAs whose engine family matches the active refine engine.
Use one body-shape LoRA at a time in a correction pass unless a stack profile has runtime proof.
Rejected/superseded library entries remain blocked even if their names appear semantically relevant.
Flux body LoRAs may be used only in Flux-family lanes; SDXL body LoRAs may be used only in SDXL/Pony-compatible lanes.
Body-shape LoRAs cannot be enabled globally across the full Main Flow; they must be attached to a named pass profile.
selection_priority: generic low-denoise inpaint with no specialty LoRA
